title: Evaluation Datasets, Hard Negatives, Leakage, and Experiment Design · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible versioned retrieval and answer test collection with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned retrieval and answer test collection and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through pr…
objectives: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.
Create relevance and claim-support judgments with rubrics, independent assessors, adjudication, agreement, and provenance.
Include lexical, semantic, stale, conflicting, unauthorized, near-duplicate, adversarial, and counterfactual hard negatives.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Rag Query Set Sampling
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug RAG engineering team handles case 1128 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-eval-leakage-versioning-1ohkof" that uses case 3713 to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-eval-leakage-versioning-1ohkof
# Competency: rag-eval-leakage-versioning.
# Case 3713: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def evidence_rag_eval_leakage_versioning_1ohkof(queries: int = 120, assessors: int = 2, hard_negatives: int = 36, leaked_queries: int = 0, agreement: float = 0.78, slices_covered: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1ohkof = "1ohkof-fokho1-3713"
    assert evidence_variant_1ohkof
    evidence_axes_1ohkof = (
        "corpus1ohkof",
        "queryfokho1",
        "tenant3713",
        "index1ohkof3713",
        "promptfokho13713",
        "evaluation37131ohkof",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ohkof)) == 6
    if queries <= 0 or assessors < 1 or hard_negatives < 0:
        return False, queries, "dataset-shape"
    if leaked_queries > 0:
        return False, leaked_queries, "evaluation-leakage"
    if agreement < 0.0 or agreement > 1.0:
        return False, 0, "agreement-range"
    if assessors < 2 or slices_covered < 4:
        return False, slices_covered, "judgment-coverage"
    assert hard_negatives < queries
    return True, queries, "versioned-eval-set"
